title: BBL Strainers
description: Strainers that can be used to find items in water and other blocks
body:
Opolis Strainers is a new mod for 1.20 and 1.20.1


Join the discord here: https://discord.gg/benbenlaw 



The strainers mod contains the water strainer block which can collect different items based on what items are in the slots:

The recipe below need a diamond block on top with a diamond and a dirt to make different items



The recipe below this requires a lava block on top with obsidian and gravel to make different items



The recipes are completly customizable, you can have up to 9 different outputs all with a unique count and chance value.
